name: epi
description: Search and rank academic papers for an EPI wiki.

interface.shortDescription: v0.1.2 | Find, vet, and stage high-quality academic papers for agent-mediated Obsidian wiki ingest.
interface.longDescription: EPI packages a Codex workflow for profile-driven academic paper discovery, evidence-grounded reader/critic review, MinerU parsing, low-burden reading reports, wiki handoff, and proposal-based quality evolution. It derives search terms, venue prior, ranking, and wiki/reader emphasis from the user's config plus the current request, preserves raw artifacts, and prepares handoffs for an agent to write into the target Obsidian/LLM Wiki according to that vault's contract.
defaultPrompt: Prepare ranked papers through MinerU parse, reader/critic/staging, report, and check the paper gate.
